name: highlighters-consumer-smoke
description: Installs highlighters tarballs and runs ESM/CJS/subpath/SSR import smokes. @highlighters/* deps are added at install time by scripts/consumer-smoke.sh against the just-packed tarballs (do not pin them in dependencies). The pnpm.overrides below point each @highlighters/* at its packed tarball so a wrapper's transitive @highlighters/core dep resolves to the sibling tarball instead of the (unpublished) registry — update the 0.0.0 filenames here if the package version bumps.

scripts.smoke: node esm-smoke.mjs && node cjs-smoke.cjs && node subpath-smoke.mjs && node ssr-smoke.mjs
